mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_section_km(id, tenant_id, route_id, route_code, line_id, km_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, label, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, project_id, remark, geom, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeId}, #{routeCode}, #{lineId}, #{kmCode}, #{direction}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthM}, #{label}, #{pavementType}, #{technicalGrade}, #{roadWidth}, #{projectId}, #{remark}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_section_km SET route_id=#{routeId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, line_id=#{lineId}, km_code=#{kmCode}, direction=#{direction}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_m=#{lengthM}, label=#{label}, pavement_type=#{pavementType}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, road_width=#{roadWidth}, project_id=#{projectId}, remark=#{remark}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM road_section_km WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND km_code=#{kmCode} AND deleted=false LIMIT 1
SELECT km_code AS kmCode, id FROM road_section_km WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted=false AND km_code IN #{c}

SELECT id, route_code AS routeCode, direction, start_stake AS startStake, end_stake AS endStake FROM road_section_km WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted=false AND (route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake) IN
(#{r.routeCode},#{r.direction},#{r.startStake},#{r.endStake})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO road_section_km(id, tenant_id, route_id, route_code, line_id, km_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, label, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, project_id, remark, geom, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{e.id}, #{tenantId}, #{e.routeId}, #{e.routeCode}, #{e.lineId}, #{e.kmCode}, #{e.direction}, #{e.startStake}, #{e.endStake}, #{e.lengthM}, #{e.label}, #{e.pavementType}, #{e.technicalGrade}, #{e.roadWidth}, #{e.projectId}, #{e.remark}, ST_GeomFromText(#{e.geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{userId}, #{userId}, now(), now(), false)
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, km_code) DO UPDATE SET route_id = EXCLUDED.route_id, route_code = EXCLUDED.route_code, line_id = EXCLUDED.line_id, direction = EXCLUDED.direction, start_stake = EXCLUDED.start_stake, end_stake = EXCLUDED.end_stake, length_m = EXCLUDED.length_m, label = EXCLUDED.label, pavement_type = EXCLUDED.pavement_type, technical_grade = EXCLUDED.technical_grade, road_width = EXCLUDED.road_width, project_id = EXCLUDED.project_id, remark = EXCLUDED.remark, geom = EXCLUDED.geom, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = now(), deleted = false
